name: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account
SIGMA Description: Detects potential attempts made to set the Directory Services Restore Mode administrator password.
The Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) account is a local administrator account on Domain Controllers.
Attackers may change the password in order to obtain persistence.


False positives:
- Initial installation of a domain controller.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4794 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4794 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Password Change on Directory Service Restore Mode (DSRM) Account
